description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes code on push to branch 2.1.x, on pull requests to 2.1.x, and on a weekly schedule. Run an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions for actions and contents, and write permission for security events. Use a matrix strategy to analyze C++ and JavaScript languages with CodeQL, checking out the repository, initializing CodeQL tools, autobuilding compiled languages, and performing CodeQL analysis.
